word: G4161 - ποίημα - poíēma - poy'-ay-mah - Thing that is made

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Thing that is made
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter / பெயர்ச்சொல் (அஃறிணை)
that which has been made; a work: of the works of God as creator
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4160; a product, that is, fabric (literally or figuratively): - thing that is made, workmanship.
